sqlMap.select: /* mesCalDAO.mainCalendarWorkList */ SELECT eChangeKey AS itemId, eWorkStart AS itemDate FROM I_CHANGE WHERE 1=1 AND DATE_FORMAT(eWorkStart, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN #calStart# AND #calEnd#
/* mesCalDAO.mainCalendarErrList */ SELECT ISSUE_NUM AS itemId, eProcessingDate AS itemDate FROM I_ISSUE WHERE 1=1 AND eProcessingDate >= #calStart# AND #calEnd# > eProcessingDate
/* mesCalDAO.mainCalendarInsList */ SELECT INSPECTION_NUM AS itemId, eInspectionDate AS itemDate FROM INSPECTION WHERE 1=1 AND eInspectionDate >= #calStart# AND #calEnd# > eInspectionDate
